_publications._publicationTitle: Metalloproteinase 1 downregulation in neurofibromatosis 1: Therapeutic potential of antimalarial hydroxychloroquine and chloroquine.

_contextSnippet: The transfection of NF1 siRNA successfully lowered the mRNA (Fig. 4c) and protein (Fig. 4d) levels of NF1 in both HEFs and NFFs
details: Successfully lowered NF1 mRNA and protein levels in both HEFs and NFFs
